message:
test(fwc): expand policy, readiness, and test-observability coverage

- policy_cmd: add 498 lines of transport_policy_changed and zone policy
  tests covering single-field toggles, all-field permutations, and
  identical-policy no-change assertions
- readiness: clarify doc comments about manifest vs legacy connector
  gaps and update audit comment to reflect metadata truthfulness framing
- test_observability: add 875 lines covering ScenarioLayer parsing,
  RedactionEngine field matching, coverage gap detection, and scenario
  builder edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
